asset_name: Static branch obstacle — narrow lane gate
shared_properties: The obstacle uses dark sepia wood tones that stay readable against the sky and tree layers.
The branch keeps a thin rectangular collision-friendly profile so lane judgement remains fair.
The silhouette presents twig forks as secondary detail without hiding the main passable gap.
differences: This base obstacle defines the narrow branch gate used before the stage reaches the harshest density.
The total width targets the early and middle depth bands where the player still has room to recover from a miss.
Twig detail stays compact so collision edges remain easy to parse at 60 FPS.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the core loop, timing windows, obstacle pacing, UI layout, and Bevy target constraints.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the sepia autumn atmosphere, tree silhouettes, and warm color layering.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle obstacle entity with a fixed AABB collider and lane-slot spawn metadata.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/art_000006.png during stage setup and attach a fixed collider sized to the authored branch rectangle.
runtime_notes: Place instances on the obstacle lane grid from 200px depth onward while preserving the authored passable gap width.
Use the same texture for mirrored placements by flipping the sprite at spawn time instead of storing duplicate art.
Keep the collider inset by 2px from the painted twig tips so visual readability stays fair during high BPM sections.

context.usage: Primary branch silhouette used for early and mid-stage avoidance lanes.

shape.silhouette: Horizontal branch with a slight upward bend, three twig forks, and a clean under-edge for jump judgement.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 240x16px with transparent padding removed from the outer bounds.
The branch keeps a readable 3-pixel-thick trunk across at least 70 percent of the width.
Only the listed branch and background support colors are used, with no soft alpha fringe.
